rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §251.005, which governs out-of-state political committee disclosure requirements.
quote: An out-of-state political committee is not subject to Chapter 252 or 254, except as provided by Subsection (b), (c), or (d).
_note: No overlap between proposed change and rule text.
